full_text:
Liu Shi (Zizhen) 劉寔 (子真)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Shi (劉寔), styledZizhen (子真). Predicted Shu would fall but also that neither Deng Ai nor Zhong Hui would return. Liu Shi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
